testcase.name: addNewAdress
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element found by By.xpath: //a[@title='Add my first address'] to be clickable, but the element was not found: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//a[@title='Add my first address']"}.
